__fixture_tag__: SAMPLE FIXTURE — not real data, for selftest replay only
__source__: Open Quantum Materials Database record schema (illustrative); real fetch via REST API at http://oqmd.org/oqmdapi/formationenergy?filter=entry_id=NNNNNN
__honest_note__: OQMD is a DFT-PBE database of 1M+ inorganic crystal calculations (Saal et al. 2013 JOM 65, 1501; Kirklin et al. 2015 npj Comput. Mater. 1, 15010). Records are DFT PREDICTIONS — not measurements. Formation energies typically agree with experiment within MAE ~50-100 meV/atom; band gaps typically under-predict by ~30-50% (PBE).
is_synthesized: unknown (OQMD does not curate synthesis status; many entries are computational-only candidates)

publication.primary: Saal et al. 2013 JOM 65, 1501 — Materials Design and Discovery with High-Throughput Density Functional Theory: The Open Quantum Materials Database (OQMD)
publication.secondary: Kirklin et al. 2015 npj Comput. Mater. 1, 15010 — The Open Quantum Materials Database (OQMD): assessing the accuracy of DFT formation energies

license: CC-BY 4.0 (OQMD data policy; citation required to Saal 2013 + Kirklin 2015)
